# health-id negative corpus — these should NOT trigger the health-id detector
# Bare alphanumeric codes without health context
UHC12345678
Order number: ABC987654321
Invoice ID: XYZ9876543
Serial number: HM234567890
Product code A123456789 in the catalog
Tracking number UPS12345678901234
Reference number: REF998877665
Customer account: CA112233445
Company registration number: CR778899001
Transaction ID: TXN556677889 completed
Booking reference: BK445566778 hotel
Flight confirmation: AA998877665
Project code: PRJ112233445
Document number: DOC334455667
Employee ID: EMP778899001 finance team
Device serial: SN112233445566
Part number: PN334455667889
Version control: VCS998877665
Library catalog: LC556677889001
Registry entry: REG112233445566
